subcodes.first_line: O servant of the beloved of God, servant of the beloved, servant of the Beauty of Abhá! He who loveth His loved ones hath served this servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خادم احباء الله خادم احباء خادم جمال ابهی من احبه خدم احبائه
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
